brand.name: Yuanda
brand.legalName: Suzhou Yuanda Commercial Products Co., Ltd.

positioning.en: Premium retail fixture, supermarket shelving and warehouse equipment systems for global B2B projects
positioning.zh: 面向全球 B2B 项目的高端零售陈列、商超货架与仓储设备系统
positioning.de: Premium-Systeme fur Retail-Fixtures, Supermarktregale und Lagerausstattung fur globale B2B-Projekte
positioning.es: Sistemas premium de fixtures retail, estanterias de supermercado y equipos de almacen para proyectos B2B globales

nameFull.en: Suzhou Yuanda Commercial Products Co., Ltd.
nameFull.zh: 苏州远大商用设备有限公司
nameFull.de: Suzhou Yuanda Commercial Products Co., Ltd.
nameFull.es: Suzhou Yuanda Commercial Products Co., Ltd.

tagline.zh: 零售基础设施 · 全球信赖 · 始于1990
tagline.fr: Infrastructure Retail. La confiance mondiale depuis 1990.
tagline.ru: Розничная инфраструктура. Глобальное доверие с 1990 года.
tagline.ja: リテールインフラ。1990年から世界中で信頼されています。
tagline.ar: البنية التحتية للبيع بالتجزئة. ثقة عالمية منذ 1990.
tagline.tr: Perakende Altyapısı. 1990'dan beri dünya çapında güveniliyor.
tagline.th: โครงสร้างพื้นฐานค้าปลีก เชื่อถือทั่วโลกตั้งแต่ปี 1990
tagline.vi: Hạ tầng bán lẻ. Tin cậy toàn cầu từ năm 1990.

kicker.th: 36 ปีแห่งการผลิต

title.en: Retail Infrastructure for Supermarket Chains Worldwide.
title.zh: 为全球连锁商超打造零售基础设施
title.es: Infraestructura retail para cadenas de supermercados.
title.fr: Infrastructure retail pour les chaînes de supermarchés.
title.it: Infrastrutture retail per catene di supermercati globali.
title.ru: Розничная инфраструктура для супермаркетов по всему миру.
title.pt: Infraestrutura retail para cadeias de supermercados globais.
title.ja: 世界中のスーパーマーケットチェーン向けリテールインフラ。
title.ko: 전세계 슈퍼마켓 체인을 위한 리테일 인프라.
title.ar: بنية تحتية للبيع بالتجزئة لسلاسل السوبر ماركت حول العالم.
title.tr: Dünya çapındaki süpermarket zincirleri için perakende altyapısı.
title.th: โครงสร้างพื้นฐานค้าปลีกสำหรับเชนซูเปอร์มาร์เก็ตทั่วโลก
title.vi: Hạ tầng bán lẻ cho chuỗi siêu thị toàn cầu.
title.hi: वैश्विक सुपरमार्केट चेन के लिए रिटेल इन्फ्रास्ट्रक्चर।

sub.en: Supermarket shelving, shopping trolleys, warehouse racks and 150+ retail fixture SKUs. Drawing-based customization for chain rollout projects.
sub.zh: 商超货架、购物车、仓储架等 150+ 零售设备 SKU。支持连锁项目图纸定制。
sub.de: Supermarktregale, Einkaufswagen, Lagerregale und 150+ Retail-Fixture-SKUs. Custom-Fertigung nach Zeichnung.
sub.es: Estanterías, carros y racks. 150+ SKUs. Personalización por planos.

ctaPrimary.th: ดูแคตตาล็อก

ctaGhost.th: ขอใบเสนอราคา

title.en: Shopping Trolleys, Baskets, Carts & Logistics Carriers.
title.zh: 购物车、购物篮、物流推车一体化方案

sub.en: 45+ shopping trolley models, 24+ basket designs, roll containers and pallets. Logo customization and export packing standard.
sub.zh: 45+ 款购物车型号、24+ 款购物篮、滚笼与托盘。LOGO 定制 + 出口包装标配。
sub.es: 45+ modelos de carros, 24+ diseños de cestas, contenedores y palets.

title.en: From Concept to Container. Full Project Service.
title.zh: 从设计到货柜 · 完整项目服务
title.de: Vom Konzept zum Container. Voller Projekt-Service.
title.es: Del Concepto al Contenedor. Servicio Completo.

sub.en: In-house steel fabrication, powder coating and QC. 10 production lines, 18,505㎡ facility. Export packing and project documentation included.
sub.zh: 自有钢结构焊接、粉末喷涂、QC 检验。10 条产线、18,505 ㎡ 厂区。含出口包装与项目资料。
sub.de: Hauseigene Stahlfertigung, Pulverbeschichtung und QC. 10 Produktionslinien.
sub.es: Fabricación de acero, pintura en polvo y QC propios. 10 líneas, 18,505㎡.

label.th: พื้นที่โรงงาน
สายการผลิต
สัดส่วนส่งออก

desc.en: Founded 1990 in Suzhou. Three decades of supermarket shelving and retail fixture engineering. Stable team, proven process.
desc.zh: 1990 年于苏州创立。三十六年专注商超货架与零售设备工程。团队稳定、工艺成熟。
desc.de: Gegründet 1990 in Suzhou. Drei Jahrzehnte Supermarktregal-Engineering.
desc.es: Fundada en 1990 en Suzhou. Tres décadas de ingeniería de estanterías.

desc.en: Custom dimensions, structures, accessories and powder-coat finishes for chain store rollout projects. Tech drawing review in 48h.
desc.zh: 支持连锁项目所需的尺寸、结构、配件与喷涂色定制。48h 内完成技术图纸评审。
desc.de: Custom Abmessungen, Strukturen, Zubehör für Retail-Rollouts.
desc.es: Medidas, estructuras y acabados a medida para proyectos retail.

desc.en: Raw material identification, QA/QC inspectors at welding/coating/packing stages. Reduces project delivery risk.
desc.zh: 原材料识别、焊接/喷涂/包装环节 QA/QC 检验。降低项目交付风险。
desc.es: Identificación de materiales, QA/QC en soldadura/recubrimiento/embalaje.

desc.en: Experienced export team. Specification review, sample confirmation and rollout communication in days, not weeks.
desc.zh: 成熟外贸团队。规格确认、样品验证、项目沟通以天计而非周计。
desc.es: Equipo exportador. Confirmación de especificaciones en días.

desc.en: Designed for global B2B buyers. Active distributor and chain-store rollout clients across Europe, North America, Oceania and South America.
desc.zh: 为全球 B2B 采购商设计。欧洲、北美、大洋洲、南美均有活跃分销商与连锁项目客户。
desc.de: Aktive Händler in Europa, Nordamerika, Ozeanien, Südamerika.
desc.es: Distribuidores activos en Europa, Norteamérica, Oceanía y Sudamérica.

desc.en: Plywood crates, foam protection, container-loading optimization. Direct FCL/LCL shipping support from Shanghai and Ningbo ports.
desc.zh: 胶合板木箱、泡沫防撞、装柜优化。支持上海、宁波港 FCL/LCL 直发。
desc.es: Cajas de madera, protección, optimización de contenedores.

desc.en: Quality management system certified per ISO 9001 standard. Documented procedures across procurement, production and shipping.
desc.zh: 通过 ISO 9001 质量管理体系认证。采购、生产、发货全流程标准化文档。

desc.en: Factory inspected and legal status confirmed by third-party (Alibaba / SGS). 18,505㎡ facility, 10 production lines, 300+ workers.
desc.zh: 经第三方机构（Alibaba / SGS）实地核验工厂资质。18,505㎡ 厂区、10 条产线、300+ 员工。

desc.en: 100% protection on product quality and on-time shipment, backed by Alibaba.com escrow.
desc.zh: 产品质量与按时交货 100% 保障，Alibaba.com 资金托管。
desc.de: 100% Schutz für Produktqualität und pünktliche Lieferung.

location.en: Yiwu showroom and global project presentations
location.zh: 义乌展厅与全球项目展示
location.es: Showroom de Yiwu y presentaciones globales

description.en: The 2026 catalogue presents Yuanda’s supermarket shelving, warehouse rack, shopping trolley and basket systems for professional buyers. Additional exhibition photos can be added when verified assets are available.
description.zh: 2026 产品册系统展示远大的商超货架、仓储架、购物车与购物篮产品线，面向专业采购商。后续可补充真实展会与展厅照片。
description.de: Der 2026-Katalog prasentiert Yuandas Regale, Lagerregale, Einkaufswagen und Korbe fur professionelle Kaufer.
description.es: El catalogo 2026 presenta estanterias, racks, carros y cestas para compradores profesionales.

notes.en: Official 2026 company catalogue available for download and online viewing.
notes.zh: 2026 官方公司产品册已支持在线查看与下载。

sub.en: USA, Canada — grocery chains, warehouse clubs
sub.zh: 美国、加拿大 — 商超与会员店
南欧、东欧 — 项目采购
澳大利亚、新西兰 — 耐用门店设备
南美、中东非 — 高性价比货架

intelligence.c: Retail chain procurement teams, supermarket equipment distributors, warehouse project contractors and store fixture buyers.
Official email, verified client logos, exhibition photos and certificate originals should be collected before final commercial launch.
Lead with verified factory capacity, project customization, on-time delivery and category breadth rather than low price.

sop.c: Ask for store layout, target shelf dimensions, load-bearing requirement, finish color, quantity, destination port and rollout timeline.
Recommend one gondola shelf unit or trolley sample, confirm sample cost, packaging, lead time and freight method before bulk quotation.
Send 3D layout or drawing confirmation, QC checklist and delivery schedule to reduce buyer uncertainty.

whySub.en: Manufacturing capability, project customization and catalogue-level product management for global B2B buyers.
whySub.zh: 面向全球 B2B 采购商的制造能力、项目定制与产品册级产品管理。
whySub.es: Fabricacion, personalizacion y gestion de catalogo para compradores B2B.

fairSub.en: A brand-owned catalogue and showroom structure for professional retail equipment procurement.
fairSub.zh: 面向专业零售设备采购的品牌自有产品册与展厅展示体系。
fairSub.de: Markeneigener Katalog und Showroom fur professionelle Beschaffung.
fairSub.es: Catalogo y showroom propios para compra profesional.

catsSub.en: Homepage categories focus on business entry points; the full 152-record database is opened separately.
catsSub.zh: 首页分类只作为业务入口；完整 152 条产品数据库单独打开。
catsSub.de: Startseiten-Kategorien als Einstieg; vollstandige Datenbank separat.
catsSub.es: Categorias como entrada; base completa separada.

certSub.en: Manufacturing and project capability signals are presented as brand-owned proof points.
certSub.zh: 以品牌自有证据表达制造与项目能力，而非平台店铺背书。
certSub.de: Fertigungs- und Projektfahigkeiten als markeneigene Nachweise.
certSub.es: Capacidades de fabricacion y proyecto como pruebas propias de marca.

processSub.en: A practical B2B path from specification to delivery.
processSub.zh: 从规格确认到交付的实用 B2B 项目路径。
processSub.de: Praktischer B2B-Weg von Spezifikation bis Lieferung.
processSub.es: Ruta B2B desde especificacion hasta entrega.

partnersSub.en: Client logos can be replaced after the factory provides authorized references; current blocks show buyer profiles.
partnersSub.zh: 客户授权 Logo 到位后可替换；当前以买家类型画像做高级占位。
partnersSub.de: Logos konnen nach Autorisierung ersetzt werden.
partnersSub.es: Los logos se reemplazan tras autorizacion.

regionSub.en: Focus on retail equipment distributors, chain-store rollout contractors and warehouse solution partners.
regionSub.zh: 面向商超设备经销商、连锁门店项目承包商与仓储方案伙伴。
regionSub.de: Fokus auf Retail-Ausstatters, Rollout-Partner und Lagerlosungen.
regionSub.es: Enfoque en distribuidores, contratistas retail y soluciones de almacen.

contactSub.en: Share drawings, target dimensions, quantity and delivery market for a reliable quotation.
contactSub.zh: 发送图纸、目标尺寸、数量与交付市场，便于快速准确报价。
contactSub.de: Zeichnungen, Masse, Menge und Zielmarkt senden.
contactSub.es: Enviar planos, medidas, cantidad y mercado destino.

catalogueTitle.zh: 远大货架 2026 公司产品册

catalogueSub.en: A complete 28-page digital catalogue for project buyers: supermarket shelving, warehouse racks, shopping trolleys and retail equipment systems.
catalogueSub.zh: 完整 28 页电子产品册，面向项目采购商展示商超货架、仓储架、购物车与零售设备系统。
catalogueSub.de: Ein vollstandiger 28-seitiger digitaler Katalog fur Projektkaufer.
catalogueSub.es: Catalogo digital completo de 28 paginas para compradores de proyectos.

catalogSub.en: 152 item numbers extracted from the 2026 PDF catalogue, with specifications, materials, capacities and source pages where visible.
catalogSub.zh: 已从 2026 PDF 产品册提取 152 个产品型号，展示可识别的规格、材质、承重/容量和来源页码。

c.en: Store layout, dimensions, load-bearing, finish and quantity.
c.zh: 确认门店布局、尺寸、承重、表面处理与数量。
c.de: Layout, Masse, Traglast, Finish und Menge.
c.es: Layout, medidas, carga, acabado y cantidad.

c.en: Confirm drawing, sample cost, packaging and freight method.
c.zh: 确认图纸、样品费、包装与运输方式。
c.es: Confirmar plano, muestra, embalaje y flete.

c.en: QC checkpoints for raw materials, welding, coating and packing.
c.zh: 覆盖原料、焊接、喷涂与包装的质检节点。
c.de: QC fur Material, Schweissen, Beschichtung und Verpackung.
c.es: QC en materia prima, soldadura, recubrimiento y empaque.

c.en: Export packing, shipment coordination and rollout support.
c.zh: 出口包装、船运协调与项目落地支持。
c.es: Embalaje, coordinacion y soporte de rollout.
